title: LUDO Contract B — job message (gateway -> agent)
description: The broker payload the gateway publishes onto NATS subject `ludo.jobs`; the agent worker consumes + acks it. Canonical mirror of ludo-agent src/ludo/worker/payload.py::JobMessage. Carries the opaque account_id + per-job vault-decrypted Odoo creds + params. No PII beyond creds, no slug (Principle #9). One message -> one dispatch via the JobType registry.

type.description: Dispatch key -> actions.* handler. Mirror of ludo-agent JobType StrEnum.

account_id.description: Opaque, persisted per-customer id. The only customer id that crosses to the agent. No PII.

idempotency_key.description: At-least-once delivery + idempotent execution; dedupe key.

session_id.description: The control-plane-assigned ludo_session_id; event-stream key when present.

source.description: Source Odoo creds (vault-decrypted config mapping) the worker builds OdooCredentials from.
